title: Garden Route police gather in Thembalethu for National Prayer Day
description: GEORGE NEWS - Police members from across the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Police members from across the Garden Route district converged in Thembalethu today, Friday 26 September, to take part in the National Prayer Day for Police Safety.


> The event was hosted at World of Faith Ministries in Zone 9, and brought together district police management, station commanders, officers, members of the religious fraternity, stakeholders and members of the community.


Garden Route District Commissioner Major General Phumzile Cetyana and Deputy District Commissioner Brigadier Belinda Pather also attended the event.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
